expanded_element.title: What Is Mineral Deodorant (& Why to Switch to It) - Wellnesse
expanded_element.description: Potassium alum is naturally antimicrobial, which means it helps to eliminate the bacteria responsible for body odor. Other natural deodorizers include magnesium - another naturally antibacterial mineral salt - and sodium bicarbonate, better known as baking soda.

expanded_element.title: Underarm antiperspirants/deodorants and breast cancer - PMC - NIH
expanded_element.description: On the basis that antiperspirant formulations are designed to block underarm sweat ducts [8] and breast cysts arise from blocked breast ducts in the adjacent region of the body [1], it is plausible that breast cysts might also arise from antiperspirant use if sufficient chemicals are absorbed over long periods of usage ...
